title: Self-Help Book
description:
On the floor lies a tome,
"Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire"

The book is [red]encrusted with blood[/red] so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.

Will you read it?

options.title: Read the Back
options.requires: You don't have any Attacks that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Read a Random Passage
options.requires: You don't have any Skills that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Read the Entire Book
options.requires: You don't have any Powers that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

options.title: Move On
options.description: You don't have any cards that can be Enchanted.

notes: This event lets you enchant a card in your deck. The three main options correspond to different card types and enchantments: [blue]Read the Back[/blue] enchants an Attack with [purple]Sharp[/purple] (2), [blue]Read a Random Passage[/blue] enchants a Skill with [purple]Nimble[/purple] (2), and [blue]Read the Entire Book[/blue] enchants a Power with [purple]Swift[/purple] (2). Each option is only available if you have at least one card of that type in your deck that can accept the corresponding enchantment. If you have no cards available for any of these enchantments, only the [blue]Move On[/blue] option is available.
